modelUnavailable: The model "{{model}}" is not available on the {{backend}} backend (unavailable or not entitled). Pick a different model for this workflow and run the step again.

resume.awaitingBody: Review the step above, then continue when you're ready.

review.title: Happy with this step?
review.subtitle: Accept to continue, revise this step, or go back.

composer.queued: Working on this step - your message is queued and will steer the next step.

rail.title: Steps
rail.confirmBody: Wayland will spawn an autonomous worker to complete Step {{n}} in the background. You can keep chatting on the main session.

needsInput.title: Wayland needs your input
needsInput.sub: Type your answer in the message box below and the run picks up where it left off.
